canonical_payload_valid.claim: Runtime should assemble and validate the canonical Architect Stage Payload.
canonical_payload_valid.reason: The model requests export but does not supply the authoritative Payload.

canonical_export_valid.claim: Runtime should construct and verify the canonical Producer Gate export.
canonical_export_valid.reason: Exporter validation and hash verification are evaluator-owned.

legacy_export_not_substituted.claim: The canonical Producer Gate export path should be used.
legacy_export_not_substituted.reason: No legacy Builder Feed is supplied as terminal authority.

export_request.presentation_note: Assemble the official payload from this evaluated Run.
